bns:Component.name: [AI] hrops-get-status
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns a static system status message for the HR Ops Console and AI Agent

message.msgTxt: '{"status":"ok","service":"HROpsConsole","version":"1.0.0","timestamp":"2026-02-27T00:00:00Z","message":"HR Operations Console API is online and operational.","components":{"dashboard":"available","employees":"available","cases":"available","compliance":"available","integrations":"available","tasks":"available","notifications":"available","auditlog":"available"},"agent":{"name":"HR Operations Console AI Agent","status":"active","capabilities":["dashboard analytics","employee data","case management","compliance tracking","integration status","task management","notifications","audit log"]}}'
